Mexico travel advice

Mexico - Exercise a high degree of caution

Regional Advisory - Avoid all travel

Avoid all travel to the following states due to high levels of violence and organized crime:

Colima, Guerrero, Michoacan, Sinaloa, Tamaulipas, and Zacatecas.

Regional Advisory - Avoid non-essential travel

Avoid non-essential travel to the following states due to high levels of violence:

Chiapas, Chihuahua, Durango, Guanajuato, Jalisco, Morelos, and Sonora.
